title.description: Featured heading of the services section.

description.current: We build custom software, web platforms, and mobile apps with an obsession for speed, type safety, and premium user experience.

items.title: Custom Web App Development
items.description: Modern, high-performance web applications built from scratch. Specialized in Next.js, React, and serverless backends.

items.title: Cloud & Infrastructure
items.description: Automated deployments, serverless scaling, and cloud migrations on AWS, GCP, and Azure. Kubernetes, Docker, and IaC.

items.title: UI/UX Design Engineering
items.description: High-fidelity prototypes, unified component libraries, and interactive design systems that bridge the gap from Figma to code.

title.current: What makes working with us different

description.current: We're a small, senior team that treats your project like our own product. No juniors learning on your dime.

reasons.title: We ship when we say we will
reasons.description: Transparent timelines, milestone tracking, and honest updates. We don't overpromise — we build in buffer and deliver on schedule.

reasons.title: We've done this before
reasons.description: Across startups, scale-ups, and enterprises — from fintech to healthcare to e-commerce. We bring cross-industry perspective to every engagement.

reasons.title: You'll always know what's happening
reasons.description: Dedicated Slack channel, weekly demos, direct access to your engineering lead. No account managers playing telephone.

reasons.title: We don't disappear after launch
reasons.description: 24/7 monitoring, proactive maintenance, and ongoing support. Your product keeps running smoothly while you focus on growth.

description.current: A few examples of what we've built. Every project started as a conversation.

items.title: FinFlow Dashboard
items.description: Enterprise financial analytics platform with real-time data visualization and predictive modeling. Built a real-time risk scoring engine and automated reporting.

items.title: MediConnect App
items.description: Cross-platform telehealth app connecting patients with specialists. Video consultations, prescription management, and insurance integration.

items.title: CloudSync Pro
items.description: Multi-cloud infrastructure management platform handling 10M+ daily API requests. Reduced deployment time from hours to minutes.

items.title: AI Document Parser
items.description: Intelligent document extraction system that processes invoices, contracts, and forms with 99.7% accuracy. Replaced manual data entry.

steps.title: Understand
steps.description: We dig into your problem, your users, and your constraints. No generic discovery workshops — just real conversations.

steps.title: Design
steps.description: Wireframes, interactive prototypes, and layout flowcharts. We design collaboratively so there are no surprises when development starts.

steps.title: Build
steps.description: Agile sprints with biweekly demos. You see working software early and often — not a big reveal after 4 months.

steps.title: Ship & Support
steps.description: We handle the launch, set up monitoring, and stick around for ongoing iteration. We don't ghost you after deploy.

title.current: Don't take our word for it

items.name: Sarah Chen
items.content: We came to Velnix with a mess of legacy code and a 3-month deadline. They didn't just refactor — they rethought the entire architecture and delivered a week early. Our engineering team still references their codebase as the gold standard.

items.name: Marcus Rodriguez
items.content: Most agencies nod along and build what you ask for. Velnix pushed back, asked harder questions, and ultimately built something better than what I'd spec'd. That's the difference between a vendor and a partner.

items.name: Emily Watson
items.content: We've worked with five different agencies over the years. Velnix is the only one we kept. Their engineers genuinely care about code quality, not just shipping fast. The codebase they handed off was cleaner than most of our internal code.

items.name: James Park
items.content: The team felt like an extension of ours from day one. Slack responses in minutes, proactive about potential issues, transparent about tradeoffs. I've recommended them to three other companies since.

items.question: How long does a typical project take?
items.answer: It depends on scope. A marketing site might take 4-6 weeks. A full SaaS product is usually 3-6 months. We'll give you a realistic timeline after our first conversation — no guessing.

items.question: Who will I be working with directly?
items.answer: You work directly with senior developers and designers. No account managers playing telephone. We use Slack, Figma, and GitHub to keep you in the loop daily.

items.question: Do you offer post-launch maintenance?
items.answer: Yes, we offer ongoing SLA plans covering updates, server scaling, automated testing, and general maintenance. We make sure your application runs 24/7 without issues.

items.question: What is your main technology stack?
items.answer: We specialize in React, Next.js, and TypeScript on the frontend, with Node.js, Go, Python, and Rust on the backend. We deploy to AWS, Google Cloud, and Vercel using Docker, Kubernetes, and Terraform.

title.current: We are architects of the digital frontier

description.current: Founded in 2018, The Velnix has grown from a boutique agency into a premium global engineering and design partner. We help ambitious startups and established enterprises turn complex challenges into simple, beautiful software.

values.title: Mission-Driven
values.description: To engineer exceptional digital experiences that empower organizations to scale, innovate, and lead their industries.

values.title: Our Vision
values.description: To be the global benchmark for premium software engineering, recognized for design elegance and technical excellence.

values.title: Trust & Transparency
values.description: We believe in clear communication, honest timelines, complete ownership of our code, and long-term partnerships.

values.title: Human-Centric Design
values.description: Technology is for people. We design and build systems that prioritize usability, accessibility, and delight.

team.name: Alex Mercer
team.bio: Former Tech Lead at Stripe. Passionate about software architecture and product design.

team.name: Elena Rostova
team.bio: Ex-Google Senior Staff Engineer. Distributed systems specialist and open-source contributor.

team.name: Marcus Vance
team.bio: Award-winning designer. Formerly lead designer at Figma and Apple.

team.name: Sarah Jenkins
team.bio: Ph.D. in Computer Science from Stanford. Focuses on NLP and neural network optimizations.

title.current: Build the future of software engineering

description.current: Join a remote-first team of dedicated builders, engineers, and designers obsessed with craft, layout precision, and performance.

perks.title: Competitive Pay
perks.description: Premium salaries matching global standards, plus annual performance-based profit sharing.

perks.title: Health & Wellness
perks.description: Full medical cover, dental packages, mental health allowances, and gym memberships.

perks.title: Flexible Hours
perks.description: Work remote-first with asynchronous collaboration, core sync hours, and unlimited PTO.

perks.title: Gear Allowance
perks.description: Receive a remote setup budget of $3,000 for high-end laptops, screens, and ergonomic desks.

title.current: Empowering your team with premium services

description.current: We combine high-performance engineering with modern design principles to build digital products that feel premium and scale endlessly.

detailedServices.title: Custom Software Development
detailedServices.description: Bespoke backend systems, operational hubs, and integrations customized to your business goals. We design with performance, scalability, and security from the core.

detailedServices.title: Web Development & Jamstack
detailedServices.description: High-speed frontend solutions powered by React, Next.js, and headless CMSs. Superb rendering, rich SEO setups, and fluid motion that wows your audience.

detailedServices.title: Mobile App Development
detailedServices.description: Premium iOS and Android apps built via React Native and Flutter. Get the performance of native code combined with quick hybrid delivery pipelines.
benefits: App Store & Google Play launch support

detailedServices.title: AI & Machine Learning Integration
detailedServices.description: Incorporate large language models, machine learning algorithms, OCR pipelines, and conversational voice interfaces into your existing applications.

detailedServices.title: Cloud & Devops Solutions
detailedServices.description: Highly available, auto-scaling architectures designed on AWS, GCP, and Azure. Fully managed pipelines with Docker, Kubernetes, and Terraform.

detailedServices.title: UI/UX & Design Systems
detailedServices.description: Outstanding, premium designs and interactive prototypes crafted to wow visitors. Complete with structured components for seamless engineering integration.

pricing.title: Fixed Scope
pricing.description: Perfect for projects with clearly defined specifications, layouts, and endpoints. Clear deliverables and timeline.

pricing.title: Time & Materials
pricing.description: Ideal for agile projects, evolving requirements, and rapid prototyping. Total flexibility to pivot at any point.
features: Scale team up or down anytime

pricing.title: Dedicated Team
pricing.description: Your own full-time product team: designer, lead developer, QA, and project manager. Scaled for long-term projects.

description.current: Whether you are a fast-growing startup, building a modern SaaS platform, or digitizing complex enterprise operations, we have standard blueprints ready.

solutionsList.title: Enterprise Digitalization
solutionsList.description: Scale infrastructure, establish governance, and build custom ERP, CRM, and analytics systems designed for secure high-throughput corporate operations.
features: SOC 2 Type II & GDPR compliance standards
Seamless Active Directory / SSO authentication integration
Robust failover systems and auto-scaling configurations

solutionsList.title: Startup Acceleration
solutionsList.description: Go from napkin sketch to market MVP quickly with optimized architectures, dynamic prototypes, and rapid iterations that align with investor timelines.
features: Rapid prototype creation and agile feedback cycles
Scalable infrastructure layout using serverless setups
Cost-optimized deployment with Vercel and AWS

solutionsList.title: SaaS Product Engineering
solutionsList.description: Construct multi-tenant cloud products. Handle customer billing subscriptions, organization configurations, localized states, and metrics collections.
features: Stripe and billing cycle logic integration

integrations.title: Infinite Integration Power
integrations.description: No software is an island. We build our solutions to connect with your existing workflows, databases, CRM, and cloud storage providers. We specialize in building secure gateway API routers, queue configurations, and real-time syncing brokers.

title.current: Built on state of the art tools

description.current: We don't compromise on developer tools, system libraries, or deployment servers. Discover our tech guidelines.

detailsList.title: Modern Frontend Stack
detailsList.description: React, Next.js, and TypeScript form our core framework. We utilize compiler-driven optimization and Jamstack architectures for speed.

detailsList.title: Backend & Systems
detailsList.description: Engineered with Node.js, Go, Python, and Rust. We design microservices and API gateways built to handle heavy client requests.

detailsList.title: Mobile Frameworks
detailsList.description: Hybrid and native development pathways. We leverage React Native and Flutter for multi-platform synchronization.

detailsList.title: Cloud & Infrastructure
detailsList.description: Multi-cloud hosting environments managed via automated infrastructure. Supported by container virtualization.

detailsList.title: Data Management
detailsList.description: Scalable relational and document-oriented databases. Optimized with cache brokers for lightning-fast reads.

detailsList.title: AI Integration Tools
detailsList.description: We deploy machine learning models, build embeddings, establish semantic search capabilities, and customize open weights models.

contactDetails.title: Let's build something together
contactDetails.description: Have a project in mind? Or just want to say hi? Fill out the form or reach out directly.
